reviews.review_msg: Curt brought in many guest speakers and we took a field trip to a prison. 4 short assignments and then the rest of the mark was participation. Only complaint is that grading is unclear for participation; I had an A+ in the assignments but somehow ended with an A- in the course, despite meaningfully participating and contributing in every class.

exams are tough. he will tell you 5 minutes before the exam that the exam is NOT easy and expect it to be hard. that really set the mood for students before they had to write a 30% exam. NOT a nice guy. he's condescending when you ask fair questions & treats you like an idiot. he asks really random and insignificant questions on the exams. AVOID
